label: Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization

node.label: Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization
node.definition: Reliability and cost operations manage failures, replication, quotas, capacity, security, energy, carbon, and economic efficiency across AI workloads.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization is modeled as depending on Distributed systems & networking, Adversarial robustness & security testing and feeding downstream nodes such as Large language models.

limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Distributed systems & networking, Adversarial robustness & security testing.
